chunks.title: Elijah Fears Jezebel and Travels to Horeb
chunks.reason: Narrative of Elijah's flight from Jezebel, his journey to Beersheba and the wilderness, and divine provision by an angel.

chunks.title: Elijah's Complaint at Horeb
chunks.reason: Dialogue between God and Elijah where Elijah expresses his despair and God questions him.

chunks.title: God's Instructions to Elijah
chunks.reason: Divine command for Elijah to anoint Hazael and Jehu, appoint Elisha, and the promise of 7,000 faithful Israelites.

chunks.title: Elijah Calls Elisha
chunks.reason: Narrative of Elijah finding Elisha plowing, throwing his mantle on him, and Elisha's immediate response to follow.
